sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82715" key="petali/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεταλ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n82715.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fullgrown</tr_>, of swine, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0309.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Achae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope> </bibl> ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πέτηλος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
